title: denisia dehiscens
intro: Denisia dehiscens, also known as the False Flax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Linaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Denisia dehiscens include treating various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Denisia dehiscens can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
